props.name: toolbar
props.comment: Replaces the default right-side action cluster (LocalesMenuButton + ThemeModeToggle + RefreshButton). Pass a ReactNode to supply custom actions, or omit to keep the default cluster.

props.name: userMenu
props.comment: Replaces the default `<UserMenu />`. Pass `false` to suppress it entirely, or a ReactNode to render a custom user menu.
